service.name: PostHog API
service.description_for_ai: Open-source product analytics. Events, feature flags, session recordings, A/B tests, funnels, cohorts. Self-hostable. 1M events/month free on cloud. Privacy-friendly alternative to Mixpanel.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a user event in PostHog. Records what users do in your app. Events flow to all PostHog features: funnels, retention, feature flags, session recordings.

api_key.description: PostHog Project API Key (public, safe for client-side). Find in Project Settings.

event.description: Event name: use descriptive verb phrases like 'user signed up', 'payment completed', 'feature X clicked'

distinct_id.description: Unique user identifier. Use your internal user ID. For anonymous users use a generated UUID stored in localStorage.

properties.description: Event properties: {plan: 'pro', amount: 99.99, product_id: 'sku123'}. Avoid PII unless anonymized.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 event time. Defaults to server receive time if omitted.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check if a feature flag is enabled for a user. Use for gradual rollouts, A/B tests, canary deployments. Returns flag value (boolean or variant string).

distinct_id.description: User identifier to evaluate flags for

person_properties.description: User properties to evaluate flag conditions against: {plan: 'enterprise', country: 'US'}
